name: Stock Planning Status demo
query:
Select SP.name as "ID:Link/Stock Planning",
SP.date as "DATE:Date/Stock Planning", 
SP.sales_person as "SALES PERSON:Link/Sales Person",
SPC.customer_master as "CUSTOMER",
SP.warehouse as "WAREHOUSE:Link/Warehouse",
SPC.item_group as "ITEM GROUP",
SPC.item_code as "ITEM CODE:Link/Item",
SPC.item_description as "ITEM DESCRIPTION",
SPC.closing_stock as "CLOSING STOCK",
SPC.month_1 as "MONTH 1",
SPC.month_2 as "MONTH 2", 
SPC.month_3 as "MONTH 3",
SPC.month_4 as "MONTH 4",
SPC.month_5 as "MONTH 5",
SPC.month_6 as "MONTH 6",

SPC.pending_po_quantity as "PENDING PO QUANTITY",
SPC.current_month_quantity as "CURRENT MONTH QUANTITY",
SPC.to_order as "TO ORDER",
(select TB.actual_qty from `tabBin`as TB where SPC.item_code=TB.item_code and SP.warehouse = TB.warehouse  LIMIT 1 ) as "CURRENT STOCK",
(select sum(sod.qty - sod.delivered_qty) from `tabSales Order` so inner join `tabSales Order Item` sod on sod.parent = so.name
where sod.item_code = SPC.item_code and monthname(so.transaction_date)=%(month)s and year(so.transaction_date)=%(year)s and so.company=%(company)s and so.docstatus = 1) as "SO Pending qty",
(select sum(pod.qty - pod.received_qty) from `tabPurchase Order` po inner join `tabPurchase Order Item` pod on pod.parent = po.name
where pod.item_code = SPC.item_code and monthname(po.transaction_date)=%(month)s and year(po.transaction_date)=%(year)s and po.company=%(company)s and po.status <> 'Cancelled' and po.docstatus = 1) as "PO Pending qty",
(select sum(pod.qty - pod.received_qty) from `tabPurchase Order` po inner join `tabPurchase Order Item` pod on pod.parent = po.name
 where pod.item_code = SPC.item_code and po.transaction_date <= LAST_DAY(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(%(year)s, '-', %(month)s, '-01'), '%%Y-%%M-%%d')) 
 and po.company = %(company)s and po.status <> 'Cancelled' and po.docstatus = 1) as "Total PO Pending qty",
 (SELECT SUM(pod.qty - pod.received_qty) 
FROM `tabPurchase Order` po
INNER JOIN `tabPurchase Order Item` pod ON pod.parent = po.name
WHERE pod.item_code = SPC.item_code 
AND MONTHNAME(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(%(year)s, '-', %(month)s, '-01'), '%%Y-%%M-%%d'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) = MONTHNAME(pod.schedule_date)
AND YEAR(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(%(year)s, '-', %(month)s, '-01'), '%%Y-%%M-%%d'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) = YEAR(pod.schedule_date)
AND po.company = %(company)s
AND po.status <> 'Cancelled'
AND po.docstatus = 1) AS "N1",
(SELECT SUM(pod.qty - pod.received_qty) 
FROM `tabPurchase Order` po
INNER JOIN `tabPurchase Order Item` pod ON pod.parent = po.name
WHERE pod.item_code = SPC.item_code 
AND MONTHNAME(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(%(year)s, '-', %(month)s, '-01'), '%%Y-%%M-%%d'), INTERVAL 2 MONTH)) = MONTHNAME(pod.schedule_date)
AND YEAR(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(%(year)s, '-', %(month)s, '-01'), '%%Y-%%M-%%d'), INTERVAL 2 MONTH)) = YEAR(pod.schedule_date)
AND po.company = %(company)s
AND po.status <> 'Cancelled'
AND po.docstatus = 1) AS "N2",
(SELECT SUM(pod.qty - pod.received_qty) 
FROM `tabPurchase Order` po
INNER JOIN `tabPurchase Order Item` pod ON pod.parent = po.name
WHERE pod.item_code = SPC.item_code 
AND MONTHNAME(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(%(year)s, '-', %(month)s, '-01'), '%%Y-%%M-%%d'), INTERVAL 3 MONTH)) = MONTHNAME(pod.schedule_date)
AND YEAR(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(%(year)s, '-', %(month)s, '-01'), '%%Y-%%M-%%d'), INTERVAL 3 MONTH)) = YEAR(pod.schedule_date)
AND po.company = %(company)s
AND po.status <> 'Cancelled'
AND po.docstatus = 1) AS "N3",

(select sum(SOI.qty)  from `tabSales Invoice`as SO  inner join `tabSales Invoice Item`as SOI on SOI.parent = SO.name where SO.docstatus=1  and monthname(SO.posting_date)=%(month)s and year(SO.posting_date)=%(year)s and SO.company=%(company)s and SOI.item_code = SPC.item_code LIMIT 1) as "CURRENT MONTH SALES QUANTITY",
(select(select sum(SOI.qty)  from `tabSales Invoice`as SO  inner join `tabSales Invoice Item`as SOI on SOI.parent = SO.name where SO.docstatus=1  and monthname(SO.posting_date)=%(month)s and year(SO.posting_date)=%(year)s and SO.company=%(company)s and SOI.item_code = SPC.item_code LIMIT 1)/ SPC.current_month_quantity) as "MOVEMENT"


from `tabStock Planning` as SP 

inner join `tabStock Planning Quantity` as SPC on SP.name = SPC.parent
where SP.month = %(month)s and SP.year=%(year)s and SP.company=%(company)s
